welcome.title:
Trusted help,
one tap away.
welcome.subtitle: Find a verified technician for repairs and home care, when you actually need them.
welcome.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

roleSelection.title: Choose your role
roleSelection.heading: How will you use FixIt?
roleSelection.subtitle: We match the right help to the right hands. Pick the path that fits your needs.

user.title: Homeowner
user.description: Request repairs and home care from experienced technicians.

tech.title: Technician
tech.description: Offer services and get matched with local jobs.

login.title: Welcome back
login.userSubtitle: Sign in to book your next repair
login.techSubtitle: Sign in to your technician account

signup.step1Subtitle: Create an account to connect with top-rated technicians nearby.
signup.step2Subtitle: Add your address so technicians can find you.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.checkInboxBody: A link to reset your password was sent to

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.invalidSubtitle: This password reset link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.invalidBody: Please request a new password reset link from the login page.

techSignup.step1Subtitle: Enter your email to get started with your technician account.
techSignup.emailExists: A technician with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.
techSignup.emailCheckFailed: Could not verify email. Please try again.
techSignup.step2Subtitle: We'll use this to reach you about service requests and updates.
techSignup.step3Subtitle: Tell us your name and create a secure password for your account.
techSignup.step4Subtitle: Select the category that matches your skills.
techSignup.step5Subtitle: Please upload the following documents and provide your location details.

pending.title: We're verifying your application
pending.body: Hang tight. Our team is reviewing your documents, and we'll notify you the moment you're approved so you can sign in.
pending.contactSubject: Question about my FixIt technician application

rejected.title: Your application wasn't approved
rejected.body: After reviewing your application, we weren't able to approve your account at this time.
rejected.contactSubject: Question about my FixIt technician application

approved.title: Your account is verified
approved.body: Welcome to FixIt. You can now sign in to your technician account and start taking jobs.

verification.reviewTime: Most applications are reviewed within 24 to 48 hours.

timeline.submittedSubtitle: Your application and documents are in.
timeline.underReviewSubtitle: Our team is verifying your details.
timeline.approvedSubtitle: Welcome aboard. You can sign in now.
timeline.approvalPendingSubtitle: You'll be notified the moment this clears.

cancelModal.title: Withdraw your application?
cancelModal.body: This permanently deletes your application and uploaded documents. You can apply again later with the same email. Enter your password to confirm.

blocked.technicianBody: Your technician account has been blocked, so you can't sign in or take jobs right now. Reach out to our team and we'll help you sort it out.
blocked.technicianContactSubject: Help with my blocked FixIt technician account
blocked.userBody: Your account has been blocked, so you can't sign in or book services right now. Reach out to our team and we'll help you sort it out.
blocked.userContactSubject: Help with my blocked FixIt account
blocked.contactPrompt: We're here to help you resolve this.

document.uploadHint: Choose a PDF, image, or document file

validation.streetMin: Street address must be at least 5 characters
validation.streetMax: Street address must be less than 200 characters
validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
validation.fullNameMax: Full name must be less than 100 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.passwordMax: Password must be less than 72 characters
validation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
validation.firstNameMax: First name must be less than 50 characters
validation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
validation.lastNameMax: Last name must be less than 50 characters
validation.addressMin: Address must be at least 5 characters
validation.addressMax: Address must be less than 200 characters
validation.categoryRequired: At least one category must be selected
